channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple’s Delay-Plagued Siri Project Has Also Interfered with Physical Product Releases, Report Says
item.description: Siri is more than a disembodied voice. It was reportedly meant to anchor a whole new set of Apple doohickeys.

item.title: The 2026 Oscars Are Tonight. Here’s Everything You Need To Know.
Unacademy to be acquired by upGrad in share-swap deal as India’s edtech sector consolidates
item.description: The deal comes after Unacademy’s valuation plunged from $3.5B to under $500M, as India’s once-booming edtech sector struggles.

item.title: Notebook prices could be set to soar — and no, it's not the Apple MacBook Neo's fault, but those pesky RAM and CPU price rises again
item.description: Rising RAM prices, CPU cost increases, and tighter chip supply could push mainstream notebook prices nearly 40% higher.

item.title: L'IA menace-t-elle la science et la recherche de civilisations extraterrestres ?
item.description: Franck Marchis est un astronome et planétologue franco-américain travaillant à l'Institut Seti. Pour lui, l'IA est pleine de promesses pour la science mais il existe aussi des dangers, dangers dont il pense pouvoir contribuer à se protéger, comme il l'explique dans un article sur le site de...

item.title: This new RIG headset is aimed at PC gaming audiophiles and comes with its own wired DAC dongle — it's even half the price of the competition
item.description: RIG has announced a new gaming headset, the R5 Max HD.

item.title: How to watch Medvedev vs Sinner: Indian Wells 2026 men's final tennis FREE Live Streams & TV Channels
item.description: Watch free streams from Indian Wells 2026 in tennis' unofficial fifth slam – Medvedev vs Sinner TV channels, broadcasters and streams.

item.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra vs Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra : quel est le smartphone haut de gamme à choisir ?
item.description: Un duel au sommet pour deux titans de la photographie. Désormais tous deux disponibles, et testés par nos soins, l'heure est venue de comparer les Xiaomi 17 Ultra et Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra pour vous aider à bien choisir votre futur flagship.

item.title: Sotomayor’s Wabi Sabi is the funnest record of 2026
item.description: Shout out to subscriber N_Gorski for today's pick. They popped into the comments on last week's recommendation to ask what I thought of the new Sotomayor record. Well, I hadn't actually heard it yet, but now I'm obsessed. The group consists of siblings Raul and Paulina Sotomayor from Mexico City. Wabi Sabi is their first […]

item.title: Amazon met la lumière sur ce pack Philips Hue White & Color GU10 bradé à moins de 100 €
item.description: Parfait pour intégrer votre installation de lumières connectées, ce pack de trois ampoules Philips Hue White & Color Ambiance avec culot GU10 passe de 159,99 euros à 99,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Anthropic is doubling Claude's usage limits during off-peak hours for the next two weeks
item.description: To capitalize on Claude's recent spike in popularity, Anthropic is offering a limited-time promotion that doubles usage limits for anyone using its AI chatbot during off-peak hours. From March 13 to March 27, users on Free, Pro, Max, and Team plans will get double the usage limits in a five-hour window when using Claude outside weekday hours between 8 AM and 2 PM ET. According to Anthropic, the promotion is automatic, and users don't have to enable anything to get the benefits. A small thank you to everyone using Claude: We’re doubling usage outside our peak hours for the next two weeks. pic.t...

item.title: The Return of ‘Firefly’ Could Be an Animated Series
item.description: Nathan Fillion and the rest of the gang want to bring back 'Firefly' as an animated series, but without Joss Whedon at the helm.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Travis Kalanick’s return proves it really is 2016 again
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: I’ve been using Mac for decades - here are 5 new features in macOS Tahoe that I can’t live without
item.description: macOS Tahoe is here, and it's bringing a whole host of fantastic new features. Here are my favorites.
